Card - Class in sacco
 
Card(String) - Constructor for class sacco.Card
Takes in a two character String and sets the value and suit accordingly.
Card() - Constructor for class sacco.Card
Constructs a Card with both its value and suit completely randomized
Card(String, String) - Constructor for class sacco.Card
Takes in a String for value (full word or just the character) and a String for the suit, and constructs the corresponding Card.
